title: Components, Cycles, Topological Order, and Unweighted Paths Â· Execution Trace: Cycle Detection
summary: Validate a deployment dependency plan and explain unreachable service routes. Planned artifact: Add and verify the dsa cycle detection increment in a dependency analyzer with path evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Detect undirected and directed cycles with the correct parent or active-path state.
Find connected components and explain what connectivity means for the modeled domain.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
